text:
Once upon a time, there was a cheerful, little butterfly named Breezey. Breezey loved to flutter from flower to flower, collecting nectar and spreading happiness wherever she went. One sunny afternoon, as she perched on a dandelion, she spotted something mysterious and outlandish: a shimmering portal, pulsating with otherworldly colors.

At first, Breezey was afraid. But curiosity got the better of her. She fluttered closer and noticed that the portal beckoned with an otherworldly hum. It drew her in and opened a narrow, sparkling doorway.

Breezey fell through it and found herself in a world unlike any she had ever seen. Here, colors swirl through the air, and the leaves whispered secrets on the breeze. The ground seemed to ripple like waves on the ocean under an endless sky.

She met beings of light, who welcomed her warmly. They introduced themselves as the Etherians, a collective of enlightened beings
